title: Touch Girl Apple Blossom – “Vacation”
author: Chris DeVille

The post Touch Girl Apple Blossom – “Vacation” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Last month we learned that Austin indie-pop group Touch Girl Apple Blossom had made an appropriate decision for a band that takes its name from a Beat Happening song, signing to K/Perennial for the release of new album Graceful. They're following up the excellent lead single "The Springtime Reminds Me Of..." today with more transcendent jangle-fuzz. New single "Vacation" is smartly paired with a lovely lo-fi video, which you can check out below.

Graceful is out 5/15 on K/Perennial.
